description_long: This is a row of four modern, attached houses set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and a small front yard. The houses feature flat and slightly sloped gable roofs, large rectangular windows, and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. Each unit has a small, landscaped area in front, and the property is bordered by a low fence on three sides. The driveway runs along one side of the property, providing access to the houses and parking for vehicles. The rear of the property is more private, with minimal windows and a fenced backyard area. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines, functional outdoor space, and efficient land use.
description: A row of four modern, attached houses with flat and gable roofs, large windows, and landscaped front yards, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, driveway, parked car, and landscaped front yards.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the length of the row, backyard fencing, and minimal rear windows.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the fenced backyard area and the back facades of the houses.
description_view_3: Angled front view displaying the main entrances, driveway, and the full row of houses with landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, small porches, and minimal overhangs, with landscaped paths leading to each entrance.
